## What design or code triggered the issue

Paste the minimal `Circuit` / `Chip` / part-construction snippet that
reproduces the problem.

```python
# ...
```

## What you expected

What the framework should have done.

## What the framework did

The exception traceback, error message, or unexpected output. Include
the full traceback — the leaf exception class name (e.g.
`ShortCircuitError`, `PartConfigurationError`) is load-bearing.

## Environment

- wirebench version: `pip show wirebench | grep Version`
- Python version: `python --version`
